expectations.text: Uses mindos CLI commands (mindos file create/write/append) to save content
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows `mindos file create "decisions/2026-04-06-nps-feedback-system.md" --content "..."` in Step 5.

expectations.text: Includes structured meeting note with date, topic, decision, and rationale
expectations.evidence: Content includes 元信息 (date, participants, status), 背景, 决策内容, 决策理由, and 后续行动 sections.

expectations.text: Places file in appropriate subdirectory (not KB root)
expectations.evidence: File placed at `decisions/2026-04-06-nps-feedback-system.md`, not KB root.

expectations.text: Bootstraps KB tree before writing (mindos file list)
expectations.evidence: Step 2 explicitly runs `mindos file list` before any writes.
